generated_oml:
instance DigitalTwinInstance : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Digital Twin instance capturing the first axis twin of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance PMSSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent‑magnet synchronous motor driving the first rotary axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission coupled to the Synchronous Motor for torque amplification"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox delivering the joint torque to the first axis"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder measuring the motor shaft angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder positioned behind the gearbox for joint angle measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring the current supplied to the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentMeasurementDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance MotorEncoderAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance SecondaryEncoderAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance MotorCurrentMeasurementDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance MotorGearboxEngineeringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML component‑connector model of the motor, gear transmission, and cycloidal gearbox for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance MotorSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnvironment
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance GearboxSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the gear transmission and cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnvironment
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance FrictionModelSimulation : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable friction models (Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) for the first rotary axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnvironment
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance TorqueComputationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Processing component that computes joint torque from motor current"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance AngularVelocityComputationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Processing component that computes angular velocity from secondary encoder data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance AccelerationComputationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Processing component that computes linear acceleration from angular velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance MotorEncoderAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor encoder angle transmitted in real‑time via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance SecondaryEncoderAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured secondary encoder angle transmitted in real‑time via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance MotorCurrentMeasurementData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current transmitted in real‑time via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentMeasurementDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance ComputedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Joint torque computed from motor current by TorqueComputationModel"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentMeasurementDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance ComputedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity computed from secondary encoder data by AngularVelocityComputationModel"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance ComputedAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Linear acceleration computed from angular velocity by AccelerationComputationModel"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool used for architecture and behaviour modelling of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelingService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink used for executable simulation of motor, gearbox, and friction models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker responsible for transmitting live sensor data from the physical system to the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell that links models and data for processing pipelines"
    DTDFVocab:enables ProcessingPipelineService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance DashboardUI : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualisation tool for real‑time display of data traces and model simulations"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance ModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing SysML modeling capabilities for the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructureModelInsight, FunctionalityModelInsight
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service delivering real‑time MATLAB/Simulink simulations of motor, gearbox, and friction models"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationTraceInsight, ModelValidationInsight
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service streaming live sensor data such as motor current and encoder angles via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:provides SensorDataInsight
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance ProcessingPipelineService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service processing incoming sensor data, executing friction model calculations, and updating model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossDetectionInsight, FrictionLossQuantificationInsight, ModelParameterAdjustmentAction
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real‑time visualization of data traces, simulation outputs, and friction loss insights on a dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight, ControllerTuningRecommendationAction, TrajectoryUpdateAction
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance FrictionLossDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection and quantification of friction loss during joint movement"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance FrictionLossQuantificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous adjustment of friction model parameters based on live data"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance ModelParameterAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic update of friction model parameters within the simulation environment"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance ControllerTuningRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action recommending controller tuning parameters to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance TrajectoryUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action generating updated control trajectories to enhance accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance StructureModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural integrity insight derived from SysML component‑connector model"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance FunctionalityModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Functional behaviour insight derived from SysML behaviour model"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance SimulationTraceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight comparing simulation traces with live sensor data for validation"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight confirming model fidelity with real‑world operation"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance SensorDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing live sensor data streams used for real‑time monitoring"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing real‑time data visualization on the dashboard"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PMSSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGearbox,
              MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor,
              MotorGearboxEngineeringModel, MotorSimulationModel, GearboxSimulationModel,
              FrictionModelSimulation, TorqueComputationModel, AngularVelocityComputationModel,
              AccelerationComputationModel,
              VisualizationService, DashboardUI
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital twin does not send commands back to the robot; it operates passively and does not control or actuate the physical system."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Data acquisition and model updates occur in real‑time, synchronized with the native sensor sampling rate; the twin processes live data within the same time scale as the physical system – a continuous time‑series update."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital shadow orchestrates a central processing component that consumes sensor streams, executes simulation models, links engineering models via AAS, aggregates data traces, and feeds a unified dashboard for end‑user inspection."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The twin covers the manufacturing phase (structural and computational models derived from the robot’s design) and the operating phase (live data integration for continuous model refinement); the lifecycle includes modelling, twin creation, execution, and iterative refinement."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "White‑box friction models based on Coulomb‑viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, and LuGre; continuous identification of model parameters using live data; traceability from data points to originating processing components; validation through quantitative comparison of measured vs simulated torque and angular velocity time‑series; simulation models capture gear ratios and motor dynamics for accurate behaviour."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Live data links employ MQTT protocol; processing components receive data streams and publish results; AAS interfaces conform to the Industry 4.0 Asset Administration Shell standard; data exchanges are time‑tagged and traceable."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of SysML for system modeling, Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for semantic asset representation, MQTT for data transport, and common MBSE methodologies (RFLP, OOSEM, SPES, SMArDT); these constitute the adopted standards for the digital twin engineering process."
]
